plot outline: Into the Woods is a modern twist on the beloved Brothers Grimm fairy tales in a musical format that follows the classic tales of Cinderella, Little Red Riding Hood, Jack and the Beanstalk, and Rapunzel-all tied together by an original story involving a baker and his wife, their wish to begin a family and their interaction with the witch who has put a curse on them.
title: Into the Woods
akas: Into the Woods: Promenons-nous dans les bois (France)

distributors.name: Walt Disney Studios Sony Pictures Releasing (WDSSPR)
Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures Argentina
Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures Finland

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
